NOTE: The pre-floor and pre-reclassified hospital wage index varies slightly from the 
numbers published in the Medicare inpatient hospital PPS regulation that reflects the 
floor and reclassification adjustments. The wage indices published in the home health 
final rule and subsequent annual updates reflect the most recent available pre-floor and 
pre-reclassified hospital wage index available at the time of publication.
